items.definition_en: A computer is a machine for working with information.
items.example_en: I use my computer for work and fun.

items.definition_en: A laptop is a small computer you can carry.
items.example_en: He takes his laptop to school every day.

items.definition_en: A tablet is a thin, portable computer with a touchscreen.
items.example_en: She reads ebooks on her tablet.

items.definition_en: A monitor is a screen for seeing what a computer shows.
items.example_en: The monitor is bigger than my old one.

items.definition_en: A keyboard is a set of keys for typing on a computer.
items.example_en: He bought a new keyboard for his desk.

items.definition_en: A mouse is a device you move to control a pointer on the screen.
items.example_en: My mouse stops working sometimes.

items.definition_en: A desktop is a large computer that stays on a desk.
items.example_en: The office uses a desktop for printing.

items.definition_en: A printer makes paper copies from a computer.
items.example_en: The printer is out of ink.

items.definition_en: A scanner copies pictures or papers to the computer.
items.example_en: I use the scanner for old photos.

items.definition_en: A smartphone is a small phone that can do many computer tasks.
items.example_en: He checks the weather on his smartphone.

items.definition_en: A server is a powerful computer that helps other computers connect.
items.example_en: The server stores all the files for our team.

items.definition_en: A touchscreen is a screen you can touch to give commands.
items.example_en: My phone has a bright touchscreen.

items.definition_en: A webcam is a small camera for video chat on a computer.
items.example_en: She uses a webcam to call her family.

items.definition_en: A charger is a device that gives power to electronic devices.
items.example_en: I forgot my charger at home.

items.definition_en: Headphones are used for listening to sound from a device.
items.example_en: He listens to music with his headphones.

items.definition_en: A router connects computers to the internet.
items.example_en: The router is behind the TV.

items.definition_en: A USB stick is a small device for saving and moving files.
items.example_en: I keep my documents on a USB stick.

items.definition_en: A speaker makes sounds from a computer or device.
items.example_en: She turned up the speaker volume.

items.definition_en: A smartwatch is a watch with computer features.
items.example_en: He tracks his steps with his smartwatch.

items.definition_en: A hard drive stores information inside a computer.
items.example_en: The hard drive is almost full.
